channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped nitrous oxide canisters, 12th July
item.description:
Second lot of large nitrous oxide canisters have been dumped in the same position as the previous lot. The previous were never picked up by the council even though the case was closed. Needs removing.!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 210, Bexley Lane, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cardboard box of large nitrous oxide cylinders fly tipping on footpath, 12th July
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walden Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown grass, park is not clean., 12th July
item.description:
The grassgrass has not been cleaned for months now. It is peak summer and we cannot enjoy the park. This is unacceptable considering we pay so much tax. One of the park exits has a huge pot hole on the pavement and it is this issue can no longer be ignored.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Carlton Vale, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish stacked beside bin and on top and black bag nearby by underpass entrance, 12th July
item.description:
Rubbish beside bin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin full, 12th July
item.description:
Bin full
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing and full of dog waste, 12th July
item.description:
Full of dog waste

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farleigh Avenue, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep trench pothole almost full width of road, 12th July
item.description:
Deep trench across the lane of travel. What three words "jumped.awake.join". Getting deeper after several months of neglect. Cannot avoid driving over it towards Cadmore Lane. Likely to cause damage or accident trying to avoid it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Delamare Road, Cheshunt, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Coil spring on seesaw is broken, 12th July
item.description:
The coil spring on the seesaw in Warwick Gardens play park is broken on one of the sides. I’m concerned this could make the seesaw dangerous for children.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Azenby Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain, smell, flies, no way to drain, 12th July
item.description:
This drain has been visibly blocked for a number of months. The blockage is approx 1-2 inches from the grate and looks to be condensed fatty matter. Over the past 1-2 weeks the smell has become sickening. And currently the drain is covered in flies.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa fly tipped infront of 42 colvestone crescent, 12th July
item.description:
Sofa was left outside on the pavement 5 days ago. It’s been moved off the main pavement next to the tree and needs to be removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colvestone Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Supermarket trolley, 12th July
item.description:
This supermarket trolley your cleaning team moved from the intersection of Colegrove and Glengall roads to Colegrove Road Report: (FixMyStreet ref: 9765544) This doesn’t qualify as job “fixed” or “solved” Please remove now this trolley from Colegrove Road !
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colegrove Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gold Mini parked in road on a jack with front tyres and headlights removed, 12th July
item.description:
This car has been dumped in the road like this since the beginning of July 2026.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Kenilworth Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burst water main, 12th July
item.description:
Water arises from burst pipe
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Corringham Road, Golders Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken down furniture and other items dumped, 12th July
item.description:
The main items were fly tipped 10 days or do ago and have been added to since. Someone else reported this on 4 July, but the items remain there a week later.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1F, Flodden Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Harvist, 12th July
item.description:
Loads of coat hangers dumped here

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Harvist, 12th July
item.description:
Bag dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London

item.title: Pavement and gutter needs sweeping, 12th July
item.description:
O/s 9. To remove treedrop and detritus.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickhurst Green, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hoardings still remain contrary to planning approval in conjunction with building works, 12th July
item.description:
Building works at this property concluded over two years ago so why are the ugly 10 foot high hoardings still extant and detrimental to the street scene at number 80 Barnfield Wood Road?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 72, Barnfield Wood Road, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags, rubbish and abandoned commercial bin, 12th July
item.description:
This has been here for more than a month and is getting worse as more people leave rubbish attracting rodents

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74-76, Tabernacle Street, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
